title: NitroRewards
description: Daily Rewards - Weekly Rewards - Ingame Editor - ItemsAdder & Oraxen - Basehead - 1.21.x Ready
body:
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/29b12cc4800ecd123c463de0216f43256d0846c8_0.webp)

(!) Server version: 1.21 - 1.21.11

(!) Java version: 21

(✔) Support: https://discord.com/invite/rZSDt7xykb (200+ Member)

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/64211545a0b16b53c76e257013165171085c4b75_0.webp)

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/21c039e806dbf6e8377bb8ab560e1459f5332644.png)


✅ Daily & Weekly Reward System
✅ Fully In-Game Editor

✅ ItemsAdder & Oraxen Support

```
  itemsadder:namespace:item_id
  oraxen:item_id
```

✅ BaseHead Custom Skulls

```
basehead-<BASE64>
```

✅ Command & Item Rewards
✅ Player settings menu
✅ Live Config sync
✅ HexColor Support


![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/611ddbf1ecd21ad3ada530bda9dd48a326511479.png)

- ✅ nitrorewards.open
- ✅ nitrorewards.settings
- ✅ nitrorewards.daily
- ✅ nitrorewards.weekly
- ✅ nitrorewards.autoclaim
- ✅ nitrorewards.claimnotifications
- ✅ nitrorewards.admin
- ✅ nitrorewards.commandreward

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a0e07c9abb1f4a06ab52c12456b03985cbbac143.png)

- ✅ /rewards – Opens the main rewards menu
- ✅ /rewards settings – Opens the player settings menu
- ✅ /nitrorewards reload – Reloads all plugin configurations
- ✅ /nitrorewards version – Shows plugin version and dependency status
- ✅ /nitrorewards editor – Opens the in-game rewards editor
- ✅ /nitrorewards commandreward <DAILY|WEEKLY> <command> – Adds a command reward

(✔) 99% editable Menus
(✔) Hex Colors Supported
(✔) In-Game Editor
(✔) Player Settings

☑️ Editor Menu
